title: c Hardening Pack v0.1
author: Kotov Ivan
assertion_class: C-A4 draft normative proposals; C-A10 package-control and conformance-support claims; C-A7 where witness, hash, and signature mechanisms are referenced

documents.title: Post-Anchor Continuity and Re-Anchoring Profile v0.1
documents.role: Post-anchor authority collapse and re-anchoring profile
documents.claim_boundary: Continuity evidence does not prove active authority or personhood.

documents.title: Claim Strength Taxonomy for c v0.1
documents.claim_boundary: Governance, capability, authority, continuity, and personhood claims must not launder into one another.

documents.title: L4 Anti-Autarky Test Profile v0.1
documents.role: L4 anti-autarky and accountability-preserving dependency test profile
documents.claim_boundary: Dependency reduction does not authorize escape from accountability.

documents.title: Hardening Pack v0.1 Index and Integration Notes
documents.claim_boundary: Package-control evidence does not create a new root ontology.

documents.title: EA Value Does Not Authorize Autarkic Growth Clause v0.1
documents.role: Clean experience value / anti-autarkic growth clause
documents.claim_boundary: Clean experience value does not authorize self-funded autonomous growth.

documents.title: Temporal AI Presence Profile v0.1
documents.claim_boundary: Temporal presence is not c by default.

documents.title: Local Cognitive Infrastructure Boundary Profile v0.1
documents.role: Local AI node / private rack / hardware boundary profile
documents.claim_boundary: Local hardware and locality do not prove sovereignty.

documents.title: Triadic c Experiment and SYNAPS Boundary Profile v0.1
documents.role: Ester / Liya / Rita triadic c experiment and SYNAPS boundary
documents.claim_boundary: SYNAPS-mediated exchange does not authorize invasive state access.

documents.title: Public c Experiment Disclosure and Fixture Profile v0.1
documents.role: Public c experiment disclosure, fixture, claim, and redaction profile
documents.claim_boundary: Public evidence must not exceed public claim strength.

documents.title: Physical Agent Perimeter General Profile v0.1
documents.claim_boundary: Physical embodiment is a privilege escalation, not a UI feature.

documents.title: Anchor Directive Bundle JSON Schema v0.1
documents.claim_boundary: Machine-readable directives do not replace a valid anchor or applicable law.

documents.title: Memorial Mode and Grief Anti-Capture Profile v0.1
documents.role: Memorial mode and grief anti-capture profile
documents.claim_boundary: Memorial mode is not resurrection, impersonation, or active authority.

documents.title: Resource Actor Grounding Profile v0.1
documents.claim_boundary: Resource availability does not imply permission or authority.

documents.title: Hardening Open Issues and Repository Patch Register v0.1
documents.role: Open issues and repository patch register
documents.claim_boundary: Open issues and patch registers do not upgrade draft claims into mature doctrine.

non_claims: Does not claim legal personhood for c.
Does not claim proof of consciousness.
Does not claim automatic post-anchor authority.
Does not claim governance evidence proves model capability.
Does not claim clean experience value authorizes self-funded autonomous growth.
Does not claim local hardware proves sovereignty.
Does not claim public experiments prove personhood, AGI, or final safety.
precedence: Does not override root c = a + b.
Does not override SER, L4, Beacon, AGL, ARL, L4 Witness, Continuity Bundle, VXCX, or applicable law.
Specializes hardening boundaries and must fail closed where it conflicts with load-bearing parent invariants.
